extDesc.message: Open-source bilingual web page translation with your own AI API key (Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, GLM, custom).

pdfDropHint.message: Drop a PDF here, open a file, or paste a URL above.

pdfLocalNote.message: Text-based PDFs only (no OCR for scanned pages yet). Translation uses the provider configured in Settings.

pdfNoText.message: No extractable text found — this PDF is likely scanned images (OCR not supported yet).

popupNoKey.message: No API key for the selected provider.

optSelection.message: Show translate button when text is selected

optHover.message: Translate paragraph under cursor while holding Alt

optExcludedSites.message: Never run on these sites (one hostname per line)

providersNote.message: Keys are stored only in this browser (chrome.storage.local) and sent directly to the provider you choose. Nothing passes through any third-party server.

advPrompt.message: Custom system prompt ({lang} = target language, empty = default)

aboutText.message: Open-source bilingual web page translator. Bring your own AI API key — requests go straight from your browser to the provider, and you pay the provider directly.

ollamaNote.message: Ollama blocks browser-extension requests by default. Run once: launchctl setenv OLLAMA_ORIGINS "chrome-extension://*" (macOS) or setx OLLAMA_ORIGINS chrome-extension://* (Windows), then restart Ollama. Local models are slow — expect ~1 min per batch on laptop hardware; smaller models translate much faster.
